title: adheaping: Characteristic-Function De-Heaping Density Estimation
description: An R package for tuning-free kernel density estimation of heaped and rounded data by characteristic-function de-heaping inside the grid-Nyquist band. Companion software to Thornton (2026), arXiv:2606.15450.

creators.name: Thornton, Mitchell A.
creators.affiliation: Southern Methodist University; Clearpoint Research, LLC
